title: Verify the API health check responds successfully
description: A guest visitor can confirm the API is running by opening the health endpoint and seeing a successful liveness response.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/health
Verify the API health status is reported as OK
Verify a health confirmation message is visible

title: Block access to personalized news without signing in
description: A guest user cannot access the personalized news experience without being authenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /my-news
Verify an authentication requirement is shown

title: Register and access the authenticated profile
description: A new user can register, receive an authenticated session, and open their current profile successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/register
Fill in the name field with a unique display name
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Open the profile view
Verify the user profile is displayed
Verify the authenticated session is active

title: Log in and update profile details
description: An authenticated user can log in and save updated profile details with the changes reflected in the profile view.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/login
Fill in the email field with a valid account email
Fill in the password field with the matching password
Submit the login form
Open the profile edit view
Fill in the name field with an updated display name
Save the profile changes
Verify the updated profile information is displayed
Verify a refreshed authentication session is active

title: Set preferences and save an article from personalized feed
description: An authenticated reader can set topic preferences, open a personalized feed, save an article, and see it appear in saved articles.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/login
Fill in the email field with a valid reader account email
Fill in the password field with the matching password
Submit the login form
Open the news preferences view
Select a topic preference
Save the preference changes
Open the personalized news feed
Save an article from the feed
Open the saved articles view
Verify the saved article is displayed
Verify the personalized feed is displayed

title: Browse tech news successfully
description: A guest visitor can load the main news feed and see a list of tech articles with paging information.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/news
Verify a news article list is displayed
Verify pagination details are visible

title: Load personalized news after login
description: An authenticated user can log in and see a personalized news feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the personalized news page
Verify personalized articles are displayed

title: Access the admin dashboard and review site analytics
description: An admin user can log in, open the admin dashboard, review user and analytics sections, and confirm administrative access is granted.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/login
Fill in the email field with a valid admin account email
Fill in the password field with the matching password
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Open the user list view
Open the site analytics view
Verify the admin dashboard sections are displayed
Verify site analytics data is visible

title: Save an article to personal collection
description: An authenticated user can save an article and then find it in their saved articles list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the personalized news page
Save an article from the feed
Open the saved articles view
Verify the saved article is displayed

title: Block non-admin access to the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that a regular user cannot access the admin dashboard or user management tools.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Verify an authorization error is displayed
Verify the admin user list is not displayed

title: View top headlines successfully
description: A guest visitor can open the top headlines view and see headline articles returned for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/news/headlines
Verify a headlines article list is displayed

title: View and update topic preferences
description: An authenticated user can view their current topic preferences and save updated preferences.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the preferences page
Verify current topic preferences are displayed
Update the selected topics
Save the preferences
Verify the updated preferences are displayed

title: View site analytics as an admin
description: This verifies that an admin user can open site-level analytics and see dashboard statistics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the analytics dashboard
Open the site analytics view
Verify site analytics data is displayed
Verify dashboard statistics are displayed

title: View trending tech stories successfully
description: A guest visitor can open the trending view and see trending tech articles returned for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/news/trending
Verify a trending articles list is displayed

title: Remove a saved article
description: An authenticated user can unsave an article and confirm it no longer appears in saved articles.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the personalized news page
Save an article from the feed
Open the saved articles view
Remove the saved article
Verify the article is no longer displayed in saved articles

title: Review and manage all users in the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can open the user list and perform user management actions from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Open the user list
Open a user profile from the list
Change the selected user's status
Toggle the selected user's admin role
Perform a bulk user action
Verify the user list is displayed
Verify the updated user details are displayed

title: Unsave an article by its URL
description: An authenticated reader can remove a previously saved article by URL and confirm it no longer appears in saved articles.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/login
Fill in the email field with a valid reader account email
Fill in the password field with the matching password
Submit the login form
Open the saved articles view
Save an article URL for removal testing if needed
Remove the saved article by URL
Verify the article is no longer displayed in saved articles
Verify the saved articles view remains accessible

title: Prevent non-admin access to site analytics
description: This verifies that a non-admin user cannot open the admin-only site analytics view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the site analytics view
Verify an authorization error is displayed
Verify site analytics data is not displayed

title: Upload and remove a profile picture
description: An authenticated user can add a profile picture and later remove it from their profile successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/login
Fill in the email field with a valid account email
Fill in the password field with the matching password
Submit the login form
Open the profile picture settings
Upload a valid profile image
Remove the current profile picture
Verify the profile picture is no longer displayed
Verify the profile picture setting shows no uploaded image

title: Create, edit, and delete my own article comment
description: An authenticated user can post a comment on an article, update it, and delete it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to an article comments view
Add a new comment
Edit the newly created comment
Delete the updated comment
Verify the comment is removed from the article discussion

title: Toggle a reaction on an article
description: This verifies that an authenticated reader can add and then toggle a reaction for an article.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an article from the news feed
Toggle a reaction for the article
Toggle the same reaction again
Verify the reaction state is displayed
Verify the reaction counts are updated

title: Track a reading session and view personal analytics
description: This verifies that an authenticated reader can record reading activity and then see their personal analytics update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the analytics tracking page
Fill in the article URL field with a valid article URL
Fill in the reading duration field with a valid duration
Submit the reading session
Open the personal analytics view
Verify the personal analytics data is displayed
Verify the reading session is reflected in the analytics view

title: Update a user status or role and apply a bulk action
description: An admin user can change a user’s status or role and perform a bulk action from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/login
Fill in the email field with a valid admin account email
Fill in the password field with the matching password
Submit the login form
Open the admin dashboard
Open the user list view
Change a user's status or role
Apply a bulk action to selected users
Verify the user list reflects the administrative changes
Verify a bulk action confirmation is visible

title: View reaction counts for an article
description: This verifies that a visitor can open reaction data for an article and see the current counts and user reaction state.

steps.description: Navigate to the article reactions view
Enter a valid article URL
Load the reaction data for the article
Verify reaction counts are displayed
Verify the current reaction state is displayed

title: Read comments on an article
description: Any visitor can open an article discussion and view the existing comments.

steps.description: Navigate to an article comments view
Verify existing comments are displayed

title: Require login for reaction toggling
description: This verifies that a guest visitor cannot toggle article reactions without being authenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to the article reactions view
Enter a valid article URL
Attempt to toggle a reaction
Verify an authentication error is displayed
Verify the reaction state is unchanged

title: Prevent duplicate saves in personal collection
description: An authenticated user cannot save the same article twice and the saved list remains deduplicated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the personalized news page
Save an article from the feed
Attempt to save the same article again
Verify a duplicate save is not added
Verify the saved articles list contains only one copy of the article

title: Show validation for duplicate registration and bad login
description: A guest visitor sees clear validation feedback when trying to register with an existing email or sign in with the wrong password.

steps.description: Navigate to /api/auth/register
Fill in the name field with a display name
Fill in the email field with an email address that has already been used
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Navigate to /api/auth/login
Fill in the email field with a valid account email
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Submit the login form
Verify a registration validation error is visible
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Prevent editing another user's comment
description: An authenticated user cannot modify a comment they do not own.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to an article comments view with another user's comment visible
Attempt to edit the other user's comment
Verify the comment cannot be modified by the current user

title: Prevent reaction changes for an invalid article reference
description: This verifies that reaction controls do not change the displayed reaction state when the article reference is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the reaction toggle view
Enter an invalid article reference
Attempt to toggle a reaction
Verify an article reference validation error is displayed
Verify the reaction state is unchanged
